texto: In its basic form, nursing can be seen as a duty, but beyond the incessant operational activities that lay the foundation of our daily work, the profession is all about grace. Helping people is a noble calling. It is a privilege to serve my fellow human beings. Fifteen years has seen many ups and downs at the workplace, but I have enjoyed serving the many patients who come into my care, and have prayed for the souls of those who were on the brink of death.
explicacao: Citação de Katherine Soh sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “In its basic form, nursing can be seen as a duty, but beyond the incessant operational activities…” articula reflexao, debut, fiction em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e trabalho.
